referenceStandard: TAILAM composite weighting (Duval 0.25, Rogers 0.15, IEC 0.15, Key Gas 0.10, IEEE 0.20, TDCG 0.15) — internal, not an external standard
gasShape: { h2, ch4, c2h6, c2h4, c2h2, co, co2 } — the runner derives duval/rogers/iec/ieee/keygas from this gas set, then calls calcRiskScore(duval,rogers,iec,ieee,keygas)
notes: THI has no external published reference examples (it is TAILAM's own composite formula, not a standards body figure) — every dataset here is an engine-snapshot regression baseline. The published-standard placeholder is intentionally omitted for this method; see VALIDATION.md.

datasets.description: Regression baseline captured directly from the current, unmodified src/js/engine/thi.js#calcRiskScore, fed by the same gas set as DUVAL1-SNAP-001 / ROGERS-SNAP-001 / IEC-SNAP-001 / IEEE-SNAP-001 / KEYGAS-SNAP-001.
Regression baseline (engine-snapshot) — elevated gas set fed by the same input as DUVAL1-SNAP-002 / ROGERS-SNAP-002 / IEC-SNAP-002 / IEEE-SNAP-002 / KEYGAS-SNAP-002.
